ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each collection program */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection program (e.g., organics, recycling) */,
  "program_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste management program */,
  "waste_stream" TEXT /* Type of waste stream (e.g., green, blue, grey) */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the collection program */,
  "collection_alert" TEXT /* Alerts or notifications related to the collection program */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of collection (e.g., daily, weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "collection_time_window" TEXT /* Time window for collection (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  "collection_vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used for collection (e.g., truck, van) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_program_code FOREIGN KEY ("program_code") REFERENCES programs ("program_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_waste_stream FOREIGN KEY ("waste_stream") REFERENCES waste_streams ("waste_stream_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_manager" TEXT /* Name of the program manager */,
  "program_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the program manager */,
  "program_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the program manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_streams" (
  "waste_stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste stream */,
  "waste_stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste stream */,
  "waste_stream_code" TEXT /* Code for the waste stream (e.g., G for green) */,
  "waste_stream_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the waste stream (e.g., green, blue, grey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "collection_code" TEXT /* Reference to the collection program */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route (in miles or kilometers) */,
  "route_duration" REAL /* Duration of the route (in hours or minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_routes_collection_code FOREIGN KEY ("collection_code") REFERENCES collections ("collection_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection route */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of collection */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time of collection */,
  "collection_status" TEXT /* Status of the collection (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES collection_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "facility_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the facility */,
  "facility_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the facility (in tons or cubic yards) */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., landfill, recycling center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "collection_code" TEXT /* Reference to the collection program */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, alert, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_collection_code FOREIGN KEY ("collection_code") REFERENCES collections ("collection_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "resident_name" TEXT /* Name of the resident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the resident */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the resident's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident */,
  "collection_code" TEXT /* Reference to the collection program */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_collection_code FOREIGN KEY ("collection_code") REFERENCES collections ("collection_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_generation" (
  "waste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste entry */,
  "collection_code" TEXT /* Reference to the collection program */,
  "waste_date" TEXT /* Date of waste generation */,
  "waste_amount" REAL /* Amount of waste generated */,
  "waste_type" TEXT /* Type of waste generated (e.g., organic, recyclable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_collection_code FOREIGN KEY ("collection_code") REFERENCES collections ("collection_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "recycling_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate entry */,
  "collection_code" TEXT /* Reference to the collection program */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of rate entry */,
  "recycling_rate" REAL /* Recycling rate */,
  "contamination_rate" REAL /* Contamination rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recycling_rates_collection_code FOREIGN KEY ("collection_code") REFERENCES collections ("collection_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "vehicle_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle (in tons or cubic yards) */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., available, in-use, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., available, on-duty, off-duty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection route */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES collection_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., video, article, brochure) */,
  "content_title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "content_description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)
